productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Max Moto White Shoe
description: If jogging is what you enjoy the most, make it all the more pleasurable in this pair of nike Air Max Moto+ 8 shoes. What's better, it has ample support for overpronators, protecting the feet from injuries. Cushioned and comfortable to stay in all day, this shoe also looks great as a casual lifestyle wear when teamed with jeans and tees.Upper Breathable mesh with synthetic leather overlays for ventilation, comfort and added shoe structure Ultra sleek, lower shoe for a more neutral progression throughout foot strike Notched inner sleeve for improved Fit Reflective elements for visibility in low-light conditions Midfoot saddle and gilly lacing system for a snug, secure fit Midsole Soft, cushy foam midsole for maximum shock absorption, offering a soft, ultra-smooth ride Soft fitsole footbed for excellent fit, cushioning and support OrthoLite heel cradle sockliner provides an enhanced women's-specific fit for increased support Encapsulated nike Zoom unit in the forefoot for low-profile cushioning and lightweight support Max Air unit in the heel for a great blend of responsive cushioning and durability PU casing to protect Max Air unit and lessen impacting forces for a smoother landing Outsole BRS 1000 carbon rubber outsole for maximum resistance against erosion Duralon material throughout the forefoot for enhanced cushioning and neutral stride through toe off Environmentally conscious rubber in a waffle design and deep, Gender-specific flex grooves for excellent traction and a pliable, cushioned ride Medial rear foot wrapped in PU casing arch bridge Midfoot shank to reduce overpronation and enhance stability Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
